description_long: This is a luxurious, modern coupe car with a striking deep red exterior and a robust, boxy silhouette. The front features a prominent chrome grille and sleek, rectangular headlights, while the hood is long and slightly sloped. The side profile reveals large alloy wheels, chrome trim, and four doors with flush handles, indicating a blend of sportiness and practicality. The windows are tinted and the roofline is straight, giving the car a stately, upright appearance. The rear is characterized by minimalist taillights, a subtle spoiler integrated into the trunk, and dual exhausts. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to be spacious and finished with high-end materials.
description: A luxurious, deep red coupe car with a boxy silhouette, chrome accents, and a spacious, high-end interior. Features include a prominent grille, large alloy wheels, and four doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, rectangular headlights, and long hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, large alloy wheels, and chrome trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying minimalist taillights, subtle spoiler, and dual exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door handles and window configuration.
